items.title: Zelensky returns highest Polish honour after award stripped
items.dek: Ukraine's president said his country was open to "engagement" about "difficult and painful chapters of our shared past".

items.title: Iran says Strait of Hormuz will be closed over Israel attacks on Lebanon
items.dek: Iran said Israel's continued attacks in Lebanon are a breach of Tehran's agreement with the US to end the war.
items.body: Iran said Israel's continued attacks in Lebanon are a breach of Tehran's agreement with the US to end the war.
